calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-12-2008 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-21-2008 Continued To May-12-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Joan Sautter for Michelle Ackerman.

Ms. Sautter stated that she had looked at and understands the examiner's notes and that she would file the waiver obtained from Wells Fargo. She further stated that the she had filed the Petition and attachments under the same manner for the required code, since there is only one deed and only one half of the property is involved. The Court noted the importance of the attachments and directed Ms. Sautter to re-do the Petition, to complete line 7, 7-a and 7-b separately and for Ms. Sautter's client to be able to sign the supplemental declaration. The matter was continued to May 12, 2008. The proposed order was return by the Court.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy R. Guitron.
